task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template and extract all resource logical IDs that are of type AWS::S3::Bucket
solution_criteria: Function should return a list of logical IDs for all S3 buckets defined in a CloudFormation template dictionary. Should handle nested structures and return an empty list if no S3 buckets are found.

task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that processes S3 events, with environment variables for log level and SNS topic ARN
solution_criteria: JSON object should include function name, runtime, handler, role ARN placeholder, environment variables section with LOG_LEVEL and SNS_TOPIC_ARN keys, and timeout/memory settings appropriate for S3 processing.

task: Create a regular expression to validate AWS IAM role ARN format (arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name)
solution_criteria: Regex should match valid IAM role ARNs, capture the account ID and role name, reject invalid formats, and handle role names with hyphens and forward slashes.
